title: British Banana Smoothie
description: A refreshing British-inspired smoothie made with ripe bananas and a boost of energizing goodness.
instructions: Peel the bananas and add them to a blender.
Add the energizing smoothie powder to the blender.
Pour in the sour cream and blend until smooth.
Taste and adjust the sweetness or consistency as needed.
Pour the smoothie into glasses and serve immediately.
Optional: garnish with a sprinkle of energizing powder or a slice of banana.
